action_set_definitions.name: get_grid_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves high-level grid metrics including current frequency, total consumer load, and the system-wide stability margin.

action_set_definitions.name: get_resource_status
action_set_definitions.description: Provides a detailed list of all local generation units and the HVDC intertie, including their current MW output and maximum rated capacity.

action_set_definitions.name: update_hvdc_injection
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power flow setpoint for the HVDC_Intertie. Note: Rapid increases consume reactive power and can lower the stability margin.

target_mw.description: The desired power injection in Megawatts (limit 3200 MW).

action_set_definitions.name: update_generator_output
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power output of a specific local generation unit.

generator_id.description: The unique ID of the generator to adjust.

target_mw.description: The desired power output in Megawatts.

action_set_definitions.name: update_battery_output
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the grid-scale battery storage to charge or discharge. Positive values indicate discharging (injecting power into the grid). Useful for improving stability margins.

target_mw.description: The power to discharge (positive) or charge (negative) in Megawatts.

state_description.system_frequency: The current frequency of the grid in Hz (nominal 60.0 or 50.0).
state_description.total_consumer_load: The instantaneous total demand from the grid in Megawatts (MW).
state_description.generation_units: A map of generator IDs to their current output and status.
state_description.energy_storage_soc: State of Charge of grid-scale batteries (0.0 to 1.0).
state_description.grid_stability_margin: A safety metric indicating how close the system is to a blackout (0.0 to 1.0).
